visual_description: A man in a dark suit carrying a briefcase descends a metal staircase onto a dimly lit platform at night. He is followed closely by another man in a suit, and both walk side by side along the walkway under streetlights. The camera captures a close‑up profile of the first man, showing his white hair and beard as he looks ahead.
